---
title: "María Pía Santibáñez"
---

## PhD Candidate in Economics

I am a 4th year PhD student in Economics at the University of Chile. Before my PhD, I received a M.A. in Economic Policy from Boston University and a B.A. in Business and Economics from Universidad Técnica Federico Santa María.

My research interests are in applied microeconomics, labor economics, development economics, and economic history.

My current research examines the relationship between parental contact with the justice system and adolescent offending in Chile, as part of a broader agenda on children’s life trajectories and intergenerational disadvantage.

Feel free to reach out at [marsantiba@fen.uchile.cl](mailto:marsantiba@fen.uchile.cl).
